project_title: Adversarial Evidence Corruption and Poison-RAG Defense - advisor technical annex for LLM-supported analytic judgment
product_name: Adversarial Evidence Corruption Technical Annex Harness
runtime_target: miniature evaluation harness derived from the advisor annex
operational_end_state: The annex becomes a replayable research architecture: adversarial packet, retrieval trace, analyst validation, defensive gate, replay record, and claim boundary.
full_build_definition: A governed deliverable with object type, source duties, proof artifact, review criteria, public claim boundary, and next implementation action.
minimum_operational_release: A governed build slice for Adversarial Evidence Corruption Technical Annex Harness: artifact, source duty, proof output, acceptance check, and claim boundary.
required_modules_to_build: annex scenario registry | adversarial evidence packet builder | human/LLM validation checkpoint | defensive gate | replay record | future-study claim boundary
source_status: 8 source-application rows; 0 active passage contracts; 0 unlocated source candidates.
source_actions_before_claim: Carry 8 source-application role(s) into the first build release and convert the most load-bearing source into a close-read contract before any quotation, page-specific citation, or strong literature-positioning claim.
test_suite: claim ceiling test: public claims cannot exceed built evidence | source test: metadata-routed sources require close reading before citation or quotation | privacy test: no local paths or private directories in public deploy
acceptance_tests: Verify artifact identity, source duty, proof output, acceptance check, and public claim boundary.
promotion_stage: full-build candidate; execute minimum operational release next
current_status: specified proof plan; needs live or replayable demonstrator
launch_or_review_path: Open the project contract for `poison-rag-defense-annex` and complete the first minimum operational release artifact.
first_full_build: Convert the advisor annex into one runnable evaluation capsule without representing it as completed empirical results.
next_implementation_steps: 1. create or confirm runtime data schema; 2. implement one end-to-end fixture; 3. capture proof artifact; 4. run source and claim-ceiling gates; 5. publish reviewer-safe demo
public_claim_now: May claim a full-build candidate exists with proof and source contracts; do not claim deployment, outside validation, or production readiness until live execution and passage verification are recorded.
blocking_gates: live capture and outside-use evidence before deployment or validation claims
claim_boundary: This is a full-build plan, not a claim that the full operational system has already been completed.
